_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: TobinHall
data.message:
ROS1 - Adding latched topic transport config/metadata (#81)

* Replace the use of metadata service with latched topic metadata transport
* Refactor code and remove metadata service requests from dependent nodes
* Make metadata parameter optional +
Update README.md to reflect the new changes
* *  SW-4745: update the ros 1 driver to the sdk release 20230403 (#93)
    * Update to the latest release
    * fix issue when picking minimum time
    * fix readme link to foxy
    * Implement proper check of overflow
    * Document change and increase driver version number
    * Display success message only on success for multicast mode
    * Update ouster_sdk and remove unused method
    * Remove the time delay in sensor_mtp.launch
    * format change log message

---------

Co-authored-by: Ussama Naal <ussama.naal@ouster.io>
Co-authored-by: Ussama Naal <606033+Samahu@users.noreply.github.com>

data.author: mortenfyhn
data.message:
Clean up dependencies

* GLEW and GLFW3 were not declared. This breaks the build if you try to use rosdep.
* Some were declared as build_depend and exec_depends but not build_export_depend. Changed these to simply "depend", as that covers all three.
* Eigen dependency used wrong rosdep keyword, changed from "libeigen3" to "eigen".
    * (Check `rosdep resolve libeigen3` vs. `rosdep resolve eigen`.)
* Added a missing exec_depend on topic_tools.
